items.title: Solana: Why Pump.fun’s 4.2M SOL move could threaten KEY support
items.whyYouShouldCare: Pump.fun's significant SOL transaction may impact market sentiment and liquidity, potentially testing key support levels for Solana.

items.title: SoFi Launches SoFiUSD Stablecoin Across Ethereum and Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of SoFiUSD on Solana enhances the ecosystem's stablecoin offerings, potentially increasing usage and liquidity within the network.

items.title: Orca, Streamex roll out secondary trading infrastructure for tokenized securities
items.whyYouShouldCare: Orca and Streamex's new trading infrastructure for tokenized securities could boost Solana's appeal for institutional investors, enhancing overall ecosystem activity.
